mapper.select: SELECT NOTICE_UUID, WRITE_ID, NOTICE_TITLE, NOTICE_CONTENT, REGISTRY_DATE FROM NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_UUID = #{noticeUuid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(NOTICE_UUID) AS noticeCount FROM NOTICE WHERE 1 = 1 AND DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT B.* FROM( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, A.* FROM ( SELECT * FROM NOTICE WHERE ${type} like '%'||#{keyword}||'%' ORDER BY NOTICE_ID desc )A )B WHERE rn between #{start} and #{end}
SELECT count(NOTICE_UUID) AS noticeCount FROM NOTICE WHERE ${type} like '%'||#{keyword}||'%' AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE(NOTICE_UUID, WRITE_ID, NOTICE_TITLE, NOTICE_CONTENT) VALUES(#{noticeUuid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{writeId}, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContent})

INSERT INTO notice_file( NOTICE_UUID, ORIGINAL_NAME, STORED_FILE_NAME, FILE_SIZE, REGISTRY_DATE ) VALUES ( #{NOTICE_UUID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ORIGINAL_NAME}, #{STORED_FILE_NAME}, #{FILE_SIZE}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, ROUND(FILE_SIZE/1024, 1) AS FILE_SIZE FROM NOTICE_FILE WHERE NOTICE_UUID = #{noticeUuid} ORDER BY FILE_ID ASC
SELECT STORED_FILE_NAME, ORIGINAL_NAME FROM NOTICE_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #{FILE_ID}
